title: US: Google coding interview - find squares-ish

questions.description: Count the number of squares given a set of points. / Constraints: cannot use string, char, image or binary for inputs. Squares must have edges to be counted. In the example, xycb and xauq are squares, but bcwq and xzfq are not. This is NOT the detect squares problem. The points must be connected by a square and must also account for squares formed by multiple points.

difference between relational databases vs others, why postgreSQL here, can we use any other database, etc. - Discuss the differences between relational and other database types, justify the choice of PostgreSQL, and consider alternatives.

title: Accenture Final Interview : Experience for LLM Operations Engineer (Experienced) – Selected - GeeksforGeeks

questions.description: Tell me about yourself - Introduce your background and experience.
Tell me about the latest project you worked on – I worked on RAG-based Test Case Generator; so spoke about that - Describe your most recent project.
What problem were you trying to solve with this project? - Explain the problem your project aimed to address.
What are you storing in the Vector Database? - Describe the data stored in the vector database.
What tech stack did you use in this project? - List the technologies used in your project.
Is your system single-agent or multi-agent? - Describe the agent architecture of your system.
What was your role, task, and responsibility in the project? - Detail your contributions and duties in the project.
How do you ensure the quality of the output in your system? - Explain methods for maintaining output quality.
Which framework did you use (LangChain or CrewAI) and why? - Discuss your choice of LLM framework and its justification.

What are the components of CrewAI? / Can agents work asynchronously in CrewAI? / Can multiple agents work in parallel on different tasks? - Describe the architecture and concurrency capabilities of CrewAI.
What is the key difference between a Generative AI system and an Agentic AI system? - Compare and contrast Generative AI and Agentic AI systems.
What do you know about Transformer architecture? - Explain the Transformer model architecture.
Explain step by step how RAG works behind the scenes / Why do we need RAG? - Detail the Retrieval-Augmented Generation process and its necessity.
Have you heard about MCP (Model Context Protocol)? - Discuss your knowledge of the Model Context Protocol.

What is __init__() in Python? / Why does Python use double underscores (__init__)? / Can you define a method with a single underscore prefix? - Explain Python's `__init__` method, dunder methods, and single underscore conventions.
What is abstraction in Python OOP? - Define abstraction in the context of Python Object-Oriented Programming.
Can you write a simple example of inheritance in Python? - Provide a code example demonstrating inheritance in Python.
Why is routing required in a multi-agent system? - Explain the necessity of routing in systems with multiple agents.
Have you used any CrewAI tools? / What tools have you used (SerperDevTool, EXA Search Tool)? - Describe your experience with CrewAI tools and specific examples.
What does EXA Search Tool do? - Explain the functionality of the EXA Search Tool.
How did you integrate EXA Search Tool into your project? - Describe the process of integrating EXA Search Tool into your project.
Can you write code to use EXA Search Tool? - Provide a code example demonstrating the use of EXA Search Tool.
Can you write a sample function from your RAG Test Case Generator to check output quality or similarity score? - Provide a code example for a function to evaluate RAG output quality or similarity.
What are REST API methods (GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE)? / What is the difference between PUT and PATCH? - List and explain REST API methods, distinguishing between PUT and PATCH.

title: Accenture Interview Experience for LLM Operations Engineer - GeeksforGeeks

questions.description: Tell me about yourself - Introduce your background and experience.
Explain your engineering project – problem statement and your role - Describe a past engineering project, its problem, and your contribution.
Explain your current project – problem statement and your role - Describe your current project, its problem, and your contribution.
Write Python code to read a CSV and impute null values with median - Implement a Python script to process a CSV file and fill missing values using the median.
Write Python + SQLite query to find employees with more than 3 leave requests in the previous month - Implement Python code and an SQLite query to identify employees with excessive leave requests.
How do you manage cloud costs? - Explain strategies for optimizing and controlling expenses in cloud environments.
Explain prompting techniques - Describe methods used to guide large language models to generate desired outputs.
Difference between regression and classification – name some algorithms - Distinguish between regression and classification tasks in machine learning and provide examples of algorithms for each.
What is overfitting? - Define overfitting in machine learning and its implications.
How would you deploy a multilingual chatbot in ODA? - Design a strategy for deploying a chatbot that supports multiple languages using Oracle Digital Assistant.
What is RAG and how did you use it in your project? - Explain Retrieval Augmented Generation and describe its application in your work.
Which metrics would you focus on to improve model performance? - Identify key performance indicators for evaluating and enhancing machine learning models.
What kind of LLM models are available in the market? - List and describe various large language models currently available commercially or publicly.
What are the data structures in Python? - Enumerate and explain built-in data structures in Python.
Difference between arrays and strings - Compare and contrast arrays and strings, highlighting their fundamental differences.

How would you ensure an intent in ODA gives the correct answer? What precautions would you take? - Describe methods and safeguards to ensure accurate intent recognition and responses in Oracle Digital Assistant.
How are async operations handled in JavaScript, and how does the event loop work? - Explain asynchronous programming in JavaScript and the role of the event loop.
